title: ConceptNet Concept Node
description: A JSON-LD node object representing a ConceptNet concept, returned by /c/{language}/{term}. Contains all edges (assertions) connecting this concept to others, plus JSON-LD context and pagination metadata.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URLs providing term definitions

edges.description: Paginated list of assertions (edges) involving this concept

pagination.description: Pagination metadata for navigating large result sets

firstPage.description: URI of the first result page

nextPage.description: URI of the next result page (absent on last page)

previousPage.description: URI of the previous result page (absent on first page)
